recent_excerpts: Southern Illinois Dermatology, Saint Anthony Hospital, and North Texas Behavioral Health Authority disclose breaches affecting over 600,000 patients, exposing names, SSNs, and medical data.
Cookeville Regional Medical Center confirms a 2025 ransomware attack by the Rhysida group compromised the data of 337,000 individuals after the theft of 500GB of files.

The UAC-0247 threat actor is actively targeting Ukrainian municipal healthcare and government bodies, deploying malware to steal browser data, WhatsApp sessions, and credentials while moving laterally
